description: Register user, create birth profile, compute natal chart, verify bodies+aspects

turns.description: Anonymous user registration
Fetch current user profile
Create birth profile (Einstein's data)
Compute natal chart from birth data
Verify Sun is in Pisces
Verify Moon is in Sagittarius
Verify aspects were detected
Fetch chart summary

description: Update birth profile, recalculate chart, verify ascendant/houses change, verify old chart persists

turns.description: Anonymous user registration
Create birth profile — morning birth (should give particular rising)
Compute natal chart from morning birth data
Record V1 ascendant sign for later comparison
Update birth profile with evening birth time
Compute natal chart from evening birth data — different time, same location
Record V2 ascendant sign
Verify ascendant sign changed with birth time update
Update birth profile with different location (London)
Compute natal chart — same time, different location (London)
Record V3 houses to verify they differ from V2
Verify V1 chart is still accessible
Verify V2 chart is still accessible
List user's charts to verify all three exist
turns.error: Expected status 200, got 405. Body: {"detail": "Method Not Allowed"}

description: Register two users, verify each cannot access the other's charts, profiles, life phases, or synastry

turns.description: Register User A (anonymous)
Register User B (anonymous)
User A creates birth profile
User B checks their own profile
User A creates a natal chart
User B tries to GET User A's chart → should 403/404
User A recalculates life phases
User B tries to GET User A's life phases → should 404 or be empty
turns.response_preview: {"detail":"No life phases found. Call POST /v1/me/life-phases/recalculate first."}

turns.description: User B creates their own birth profile
User B creates their own natal chart
User B recalculates their own life phases
User B retrieves their own phases
User B creates synastry between own charts (self-synastry is caught by chart validation)
turns.response_preview: {"detail":"Cannot compute synastry between a chart and itself"}

turns.description: User B tries again to GET User A's chart → 404

description: End-to-end: register → birth profile → natal chart → transits → synastry → life phases

turns.description: Register User 1 (anonymous)
Register User 2 (as context user, will be used for second chart)
Create birth profile for User 1 (1990, New York)
Compute natal chart for User 1
Compute chart for User 2 (partner, 1992, Paris)
Compute transits for User 1's chart (July–September 2026)
Compute synastry between User 1 and User 2 charts
Compute life phases for User 1 using natal chart
Verify current phase is detected
Verify User 1's full chart details
Verify chart-scoped life phases match

description: Create birth profile, compute natal chart, recalculate life phases, verify timeline

turns.description: Anonymous user registration
Create birth profile for 1990-born user
Compute natal chart (needed for Saturn position)
Compute life phases using the natal chart
Retrieve stored life phases
Retrieve the currently active life phase
Retrieve chart-scoped life phases
A newly registered young user with no phases gets 404

description: Rapid-fire chart creations, large transits, identical synastry, malformed data, pairwise synastry

turns.description: Anonymous user registration for stress tests
Rapid chart creation #1
Rapid chart creation #2 (different date)
Rapid chart creation #3 (different date/location)
Verify rapid chart #1 exists
Verify rapid chart #2 exists
Verify rapid chart #3 exists
Create chart for large transit range test
Compute transits for 18-month window
Create two charts with same date/location for identical synastry test
Create second chart with same data (will get different ID but same positions)
Compute synastry between two identical charts
PUT birth profile with latitude > 90 → 422
turns.response_preview: {"detail":[{"type":"less_than_equal","loc":["body","latitude"],"msg":"Input should be less than or equal to 90","input":91.0,"ctx":{"le":90}}]}

turns.description: PUT birth profile with latitude < -90 → 422
turns.response_preview: {"detail":[{"type":"greater_than_equal","loc":["body","latitude"],"msg":"Input should be greater than or equal to -90","input":-91.0,"ctx":{"ge":-90}}]}

turns.description: PUT birth profile with longitude > 180 → 422
turns.response_preview: {"detail":[{"type":"less_than_equal","loc":["body","longitude"],"msg":"Input should be less than or equal to 180","input":181.0,"ctx":{"le":180}}]}

turns.description: PUT birth profile with future birth date → 422
PUT birth profile without birth_time is valid (unknown time)
Synastry between chart A and B of rapid charts
Synastry between chart A and C of rapid charts
Synastry between chart B and C of rapid charts

description: Create two charts, compute synastry, verify inter-aspects and scores

turns.description: Anonymous user registration
Compute Chart A (Person 1 — Aries Sun)
Compute Chart B (Person 2 — Libra Sun)
Compute synastry between Chart A and Chart B
Verify inter-chart aspects have correct structure
Verify score summary fields are present
List all synastry pairs for the user

description: Create natal chart, compute transits, verify events and structure

turns.description: Anonymous user registration
Compute a natal chart for transit testing
Compute transits for July–December 2026
Verify each transit event has required fields
Verify major aspects are detected among transits
Verify transit events involve expected planets

description: Test input validation, error handling, and boundary conditions across all endpoints

turns.description: Health endpoint should work without auth
GET /v1/me without auth should return 401
Invalid JWT should return 401
Register anonymous user for subsequent tests
POST /v1/charts without required chart_type → 422
POST /v1/charts with invalid chart_type pattern → 422
POST /v1/charts without location → 422
GET /v1/charts/:id for unknown ID → 404
POST /v1/synastry with same chart twice → 422
turns.response_preview: {"detail":"Cannot compute synastry between a chart and itself"}

turns.description: POST transits with start_date > end_date → 422
turns.error: Expected status 422, got 404. Body: {"detail": "Chart not found"}

turns.description: POST /v1/me/life-phases/recalculate without birth profile → 404
turns.response_preview: {"detail":"No birth profile found. Create one via PUT /v1/me/birth-profile first."}

turns.description: GET /v1/me/life-phases without precomputing → 404
turns.response_preview: {"detail":"No life phases found. Call POST /v1/me/life-phases/recalculate first to compute them."}

turns.description: PUT birth profile with invalid latitude → 422
turns.response_preview: {"detail":[{"type":"less_than_equal","loc":["body","latitude"],"msg":"Input should be less than or equal to 90","input":100.0,"ctx":{"le":90}}]}

validation_errors: [chart_recalculation/list_user_charts] Expected status 200, got 405. Body: {"detail": "Method Not Allowed"}
[validation_edge_cases/transit_date_range_invalid] Expected status 422, got 404. Body: {"detail": "Chart not found"}
